case_title: SUSAN PARRA VS. SLEEP TRAIN, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2017 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO DEC-05-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SUSAN PARRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SLEEP TRAIN, INC.
